title: SceneSegmentation
description: Agent-half output of 02_2_scene_extraction: the screenplay split into ordered film scenes, each with a heading, a one-line summary, and the scene's rendered narration/action text. The code half turns this into the canonical scenes_manifest.json + per-scene .txt files.

heading.description: Short scene heading / slugline, e.g. 'EXT. BARNYARD - DUSK'

summary.description: One-line summary of what happens in this scene

text.description: The scene's rendered prose (action + narration) for downstream shot division; paragraph breaks preserved with blank lines
